mapper.select: SELECT t2.nick_name, t1.bill_id, t1.tenant_id, t1.room_id, t1.contract_id, t1.tenant_money, t1.manage_fee, t1.total_pay, t1.overdue, t1.refund_fees, t1.`status`, t1.deposit, t1.deadline, t1.payment, t3.contract_num, t3.contract_name, t1.remark FROM bill AS t1 LEFT JOIN sys_user AS t2 ON t1.tenant_id = t2.user_id LEFT JOIN contract AS t3 ON t1.contract_id = t3.contract_id ${ew.customSqlSegment} ORDER BY t1.create_time DESC

SELECT t2.nick_name, t1.bill_id, t1.tenant_id, t1.room_id, t1.contract_id, t1.tenant_money, t1.manage_fee, t1.total_pay, t1.overdue, t1.refund_fees, t1.`status`, t1.deposit, t1.deadline, t1.payment, t3.contract_num, t3.contract_name, t1.remark FROM bill AS t1 LEFT JOIN sys_user AS t2 ON t1.tenant_id = t2.user_id LEFT JOIN contract AS t3 ON t1.contract_id = t3.contract_id ${ew.customSqlSegment} ORDER BY t1.create_time DESC
